so we can officially make the viral dot cake at home and it’s my new favorite little treat 🧁🌈 Ingredients: 1 box @Funfetti cake mix 3 eggs 1 cup water 1/2 cup oil funfetti vanilla frosting rainbow nonpareils sprinkles Instructions: In a large mixing bowl, mix cake mix, eggs, water, and oil until well combined and transfer to a greased square baking pan. Bake at 350° for 35-40 minutes, covering with foil halfway through. Allow to cool completely, then press greased ramekin into the center and twist to remove. Allow mini cake to slide out of ramekin and slice through the center to create 2 layers. Place bottom layer back in ramekin, top with a layer of frosting, then place top layer of cake with another layer of frosting spread evenly to the edges. Cover in rainbow nonpareils, allow to chill and slightly harden in the fridge, then take a center bite and enjoy! 😋 #cake #Recipe #baking #dessert #creatorsearchinsights

Salicylic Acid (BHA) Pick: anua BHA forming cleanser 3️⃣Dry skin? → Hyaluronic Acid  Torriden DIVE-IN Low Molecular Hyaluronic Acid Serum 4️⃣Oily skin? → Niacinamide Anua Niacinamide 10% +TXA 4% Serum 5️⃣Uneven texture? → Glycolic Acid (AHA) The Ordinary Glycolic Acid 7% Exfoliating Toner #kbeauty#skintok#skincaretips#koreanskicare#dermatologist

Tung Tung Tung Sahur is doing one half of the Bombaye dance trend to Copines by Aya Nakamura, with the dance performed by @temiandanais. Triple T brings the chaotic brainrot energy while leaving space for you to jump in, match the rhythm, and complete the other half of the viral dance. What makes this work is the duet energy. Copines already has that smooth, catchy Aya Nakamura sound, and the Bombaye dance trend gives it a fun, replayable movement that feels perfect for TikTok. Seeing Tung Tung Tung Sahur do one side makes the whole template even funnier, turning a viral dance into a brainrot partner moment you can actually join. Use this CapCut template for green screen dance duets, reaction memes, two-person dance remakes, or any post where you want to dance with Tung Tung Tung Sahur. It works especially well for Bombaye dance videos, Copines by Aya Nakamura edits, @temiandanais dance remakes, Triple T partner dances, and TikTok FYP clips where you complete the other half of the trend. Tap CapCut • Try this Template to use this template in CapCut #capcut #capcutpioneer #pioneertemplate #tungtungtungsahur #copinesdancechallenge

Recipe below!👇🏼Why spend at M&S when you can make it at home and even better 🍓☀️ ⭐️ Ingredients: - 6-8 fresh strawberries (preferably similar size) - 4 slices of soft white bread (crustless milk bread if possible) - 200ml double cream - 2 tbsp sugar - 1/2 tsp vanilla extract (optional) ⭐️ Method： 1. Wash strawberries. 2. Beat heavy cream with sugar (and vanilla if using) until stiff peaks form. 3. Spread whipped cream on bread, place strawberries, cover with more cream, and top with another bread slice. 4. Wrap tightly in plastic wrap and chill for 30 minutes. 5. Slice cleanly and enjoy! #sando #strawberrysando #strawberries #strawberriesandcream #aesthetic #trending #marksandspencer #viral #fyp #baking #baketok #dessert #explore #Recipe #EasyRecipe

Classic chocolate chip cookies 🤤 Yields: 15-16 Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 75-80g balls. •Place the cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 165-170C. Bake for 10-15 minutes or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream. NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #chocolate #fyp #explorepage✨ #viralvideos

Dumbbell Sumo Squat  Know the difference  1. Dumbbell Position Hold the dumbbell with both hands naturally hanging between your legs, rather than holding it at your chest. This allows you to lift heavier weights without being limited by arm strength. 2. Torso Posture Maintain a slight forward lean instead of staying fully upright. Leaning forward increases hip flexion, helping to stretch and better activate the glutes. 3. Stance Width and Foot Angle Set your feet about 1.5 times shoulder-width apart, with your toes pointing outward at roughly a 45-degree angle. If the stance is too wide, the inner thigh muscles (adductors) will take over, reducing glute activation. 4. Load Path As you squat down, the dumbbell should not stay directly under your shoulders. Instead, it should fall slightly behind the midline, closer to your posterior chain. Bring your hands slightly inward to keep the load closer to your center of mass, which helps reduce lower back strain and improves movement efficiency. #gymtips #quads #gluteworkout #gym #gymrat

Торт без выпечки за 15 минут Сметана 25% - 600г Сгущенка - 150-200мл (по вкусу) Шоколадное печенье - 500г Молоко - 150мл Шоколад - 180г Растительное масло - 1-2 ст.л Сметану смешиваем со сгущенкой (если вдруг у вас масса получилось жидкой, можете добавить 1 пакетик загустителя для сливок). Печенье макаем в молоко и выкладываем в форму (у меня форма 27х18х6), сверху слой крема и делаем таких 3 слоя. Шоколад растапливаем импульсно в микроволновке, добавляем растительное масло (остужаем до комнатной температуры и покрываем торт сверху. Убираем в холодильник буквально на 10 минут, чтобы застыл шоколад и можно сразу пробовать, отдельно оставлять пропитываться его не надо.

40 weeks pregnant, my last workout, one day before giving birth. I honestly didn’t think I was going to give birth right on my due date. I thought I was going to pass 40 weeks, but that day at the gym I had a feeling something was coming even though I had no signs at all. When I went home I kept telling my husband that I had a feeling I might go to the hospital the next day, that I might actually give birth. And that is exactly what happened. We went to the hospital at 5 a.m. in the morning. But This has been one of my favorite workouts during my pregnancy. These exercises were  my main one the entire time because this workout was easy to perform and it helped me maintain my body while still toning my glutes safely. My new pregnancy program is coming very soon. I will post all the details on the app. New program launching November 26.  #pregnancy  #postpartum  #fitness #fy #birthday

Strawberry Cheesecake Cookies 🍓✨ Soft & chewy sugar cookies, with jammy strawberries throughout, stuffed with a creamy vanilla cheesecake filling ❤️ They’re chewy, buttery, full of fresh strawberry flavor and taste just like strawberry cheesecake in cookie form! #cheesecake #cookies #strawberry #cheesecakecookies

Recipe 👩🏻‍🍳 75g butter  65g brown sugar 30g granulated sugar 1 egg  100g all purpose flour  1/4tsp bicarbonate soda  1/8tsp baking powder 120g chopped chocolate  Instructions ✨ ~ Melt the butter  ~ Add the granulated and brown sugar to the melted butter and stir until the sugars have dissolved  ~ Add the egg and mix  ~ Add the baking powder, bicarbonate soda and flour and combine until smooth ~ Fold in the chocolate chunks  ~ Put half of the cookie dough in a dish, then add 2 tablespoons of chocolate spread  ~ Add the rest of the dough ontop  ~ Bake at 180 degrees (gas mark 4) for 10 minutes then 160 degrees (gas mark 3) for 5 minutes  ~ Allow it to cool before serving  ~Enjoy! #bake #baking #BakeWithMe #cookie #cookies #skilletcookie #dessert #chocolate #bakewithme #fyp #fypシ #fypage #fypppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppppp

Pt.4 | My fall bakery menu 🍂 Recipe below 👇🏼  Crumbl released their Dubai Chocolate Brownie, but why buy it when you can make an even better one at home? 🤎✨ Ingredients 🟤Brownie Base * 180g caster sugar * 2 eggs * 113g unsalted butter (for browning) * 170g chopped chocolate * 80g plain flour * 3 tbsp cocoa powder * ½ tsp salt 💚Kunafa Filling * 260g kunafa pastry (finely chopped) * 2 tbsp unsalted butter (for toasting kunafa) * 320g pistachio cream 🍫Chocolate Ganache * 120g double cream * 100g milk chocolate (chopped) Instructions 1. Preheat the oven to 170°C and line a baking pan with parchment paper. 2. Brown 113g of unsalted butter in a saucepan until golden, then set aside. 3. Melt the chopped chocolate in the microwave in short bursts until smooth, then stir in the browned butter and let cool slightly. 4. In a separate bowl, whisk the sugar and eggs until light and fluffy. 5. Add the chocolate butter mixture to the eggs and sugar, and whisk until fully combined. 6. Fold in the flour, cocoa powder, and salt until just incorporated. 7. Pour all of the brownie batter into the prepared pan, smooth the top, and bake for 22 minutes. Let cool completely in the pan. 8. In a pan over medium heat, melt 2 tbsp of butter. Add the finely chopped kunafa pastry and cook, stirring often, until golden and crisp. Let cool slightly. 9. Mix the toasted kunafa pastry with the pistachio cream until fully combined, then spread evenly over the cooled brownie. 10. Place the pan in the fridge for about 30 minutes to set. 11. For the ganache, place the double cream and chopped milk chocolate in a microwave-safe bowl. Heat in short bursts, stirring in between, until melted and glossy. 12. Pour the ganache over the pistachio-kunafa layer, spread evenly, and refrigerate, ideally overnight, or at least 1 hour before slicing. Enjoy! 🤎 #baking #dubaichocolate #brownies #Recipe #fall
